rows.title: stale repair identity attached T7 evidence to T12
rows.root_cause: repair identity was request/session oriented and was not revalidated against the live attempt and normalized failure signature.
rows.owner_control: Run Authority defines attempt/fence identity; repair custody dispatches only an exact tuple `(environment, session, chain, plan_revision, phase, task, attempt, normalized_failure_kind, blocker_or_phase_result_hash, fence)` and supersedes mismatches.
rows.acceptance_proof: M7 freezes identity and quarantine semantics; M10 enforces dispatch and terminal closure. Captured T7/T12 replay proves cross-binding is impossible and every request/claim/attempt/decision/index ends terminal.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow mismatch telemetry must have exact evidence IDs before a repair/worker canary. p95 event-to-accepted-repair is measured in the canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: mismatch becomes superseded/quarantined and launches nothing. Delete basename, implicit-latest, and request-only selectors only after zero runtime callers and mixed-version replay proof in M11.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete basename, implicit-latest, and request-only selectors only after zero runtime callers and mixed-version replay proof in M11.

rows.title: scan-driven recovery added 1h38m44s
rows.root_cause: blocked/process-exit state depended on hourly discovery.
rows.owner_control: WBC emits durable block/exit events; repair custody consumes a deduplicated trigger; Run Authority validates current identity/fence. Hourly scan and six-hour Maintenance pass reconcile missed events only.
rows.acceptance_proof: M6A/M8 make block/exit writes durable; M10 runs deterministic lost/duplicate/out-of-order trigger fixtures and a real eligible blocked-run prove p95 under five minutes plus missed-event recovery by the six-hour backstop.
rows.rollout_gate: action-off shadow SLO, then one allowlisted repair/worker canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: delivery ambiguity stays pending and scan-recoverable; no duplicate launch. Retire scan-as-primary only after the missed-event corpus and canary both pass.
rows.deletion_gate: Retire scan-as-primary only after the missed-event corpus and canary both pass.

rows.title: repair results were not adoptable and work replayed
rows.root_cause: repair receipts lacked current grant/task/revision/tree/test/fence proof and could not become accepted checkpoints.
rows.owner_control: WBC stores immutable receipt evidence; Run Authority validates and accepts/quarantines; executor offers a verify-only adoption path.
rows.acceptance_proof: M6A/M8 make WBC receipt/attempt evidence durable; M7 joins custody identity; M8A implements verify-only adoption. Valid T7/T12 fixtures skip full replay; any altered contract, tree, test set, or fence rejects adoption and executes normally.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow comparison, captured replay, executor canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: no receipt means no adoption, never implicit trust. Remove repair-specific replay shortcuts after zero callers and replay parity.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove repair-specific replay shortcuts after zero callers and replay parity.

rows.title: mutable aliases overwrote attempt history
rows.root_cause: `execution`, batch, and review aliases acted as both current view and historical record.
rows.owner_control: WBC owns append-only attempt-scoped artifacts/events; Run Authority reducer selects accepted attempt; aliases become projections.
rows.acceptance_proof: M6A supplies the store, M8 adopts review/rework producers, and M10 proves replay. Two review/rework cycles preserve byte-identical attempt 1, monotonic ordinals, causal parents, and deterministic current projection.
rows.rollout_gate: dual-write shadow and deterministic replay before enforcement.
rows.rollback_behavior: append failure is `persistence_failed`/`indeterminate`; no success. Delete mutable historical writes after old-reader compatibility expiry and zero-writer scan in M11.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete mutable historical writes after old-reader compatibility expiry and zero-writer scan in M11.

rows.title: plan, chain, cloud, repair, and introspection disagreed
rows.root_cause: independent precedence rules reduced mutable snapshots and sidecars, allowing `repairing`, `executing`, and `finalized` simultaneously.
rows.owner_control: one pure attempt-aware Run Authority reducer; custody supplies coherent evidence; every other view projects reducer cursor/hash and keeps execution, liveness, custody, publication, delivery, and integrity separate.
rows.acceptance_proof: M9. Captured review-rework input renders `executing attempt 2` everywhere with 100% cursor/hash agreement; torn evidence becomes unknown.
rows.rollout_gate: deterministic replay, action-off shadow, then idle projection canary before any control consumer promotion.
rows.rollback_behavior: disagreement emits drift and blocks action. Delete local status classifiers and raw fallback control reads only after M11 zero- reader and forced-rollback proof.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete local status classifiers and raw fallback control reads only after M11 zero- reader and forced-rollback proof.

rows.title: heartbeat projection rewrote a growing journal non-atomically
rows.root_cause: every heartbeat performed a quadratic full-file compatibility rewrite and exposed partial destinations to readers.
rows.owner_control: observability owns cursor-checked O(event-size) append and atomic rebuild; authority remains upstream and projections disposable.
rows.acceptance_proof: M7 lands/proves the writer boundary; M9 proves complete rebuild. At least 10,000 heartbeats yield sequences 0..9999, one rebuild, monotonic valid concurrent reads, zero false stalls, and recorded bytes/time.
rows.rollout_gate: review candidate commits, deterministic stress, idle runtime canary, then controlled deployment with installed SHA provenance.
rows.rollback_behavior: cursor mismatch rebuilds atomically while the prior complete file remains readable. Remove full-journal rewrite only after rollback and historical-reader compatibility proof.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove full-journal rewrite only after rollback and historical-reader compatibility proof.

rows.title: fully serial DAGs were admitted without feasibility proof
rows.root_cause: `depends_on` mixed semantic prerequisites with routing/order and finalization did not report critical path or usable parallelism.
rows.owner_control: planner/compiler requires a reason per dependency, separates `routing_group`, calculates critical path/width/seriality/turn demand, and rejects unexplained 100% serialization for eight or more tasks.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. Replaying both finalized plans flags the observed serial chains and produces safe independent waves without changing semantics.
rows.rollout_gate: report-only compiler diagnostics, captured replay, then new-plan canary; existing plans are never silently rewritten.
rows.rollback_behavior: infeasible plan returns a typed planning blocker requiring split/replan or explicit authorized exception. Delete implicit dependency/order coupling after corpus parity and zero emitters.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete implicit dependency/order coupling after corpus parity and zero emitters.

rows.title: high-complexity tasks exhausted fixed worker budgets
rows.root_cause: complexity 7–9 tasks bundled implementation and proof under one uniform 90-iteration ceiling.
rows.owner_control: planner/compiler splits implementation from proof at complexity >=7 or records an explicit evidence-backed larger budget; executor enforces the compiled ceiling and checkpoint boundaries.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. T7/T12 and later complexity-8/9 fixtures either split or fail admission; no partial implementation is discarded when proof budget ends.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow feasibility, replay, then executor canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: budget exhaustion opens a typed blocker/checkpoint, never blind retry. Remove uniform-budget fallback after zero callers.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove uniform-budget fallback after zero callers.

rows.title: deterministic validation consumed model calls
rows.root_cause: no-file checks were compiled as ordinary model tasks.
rows.owner_control: planner/compiler emits harness validation jobs; executor runs them outside model calls with captured command, environment, output, and hash.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. Strategy T10/T12/T15 equivalents make zero model calls and reproduce the same pass/fail semantics.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow task classification, captured replay, executor canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: ambiguous or mutating checks remain explicit model or human tasks; they are not guessed mechanical. Delete validation-only model routing after zero classified callers and parity.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete validation-only model routing after zero classified callers and parity.

rows.title: invalid source refs retried for 2h09m
rows.root_cause: launcher did not validate/suggest once and lacked a startup retry circuit tied to source/runtime provenance.
rows.owner_control: launcher/runtime packaging validates the ref once, suggests a valid audited ref, caps attempts, and proves detached source/install/runtime SHA equality before start.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. Invalid-ref and dirty/divergent-checkout fixtures stop within the configured bounded attempts and never create repeated chain starts.
rows.rollout_gate: fixture and dry-run preflight before any controlled deployment.
rows.rollback_behavior: unresolved or divergent ref is a launch blocker. Remove permissive repeated-start paths after installed-runtime provenance canary.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove permissive repeated-start paths after installed-runtime provenance canary.

rows.title: provider timeout, invalid summary model, import leakage, and compaction churn
rows.root_cause: worker configuration/import boundaries were mutable, repeated invalid model requests were not terminal, and provider/compaction budgets were not joined to one attempt circuit.
rows.owner_control: executor/launcher resolves model before dispatch, isolates target/runtime imports, permits at most one repeated 300-second timeout before failover/escalation, and caps compaction at one per turn unless authorized.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. Empty/invalid model, divergent checkout, import leakage, repeated timeout, and compaction fixtures terminate within bounds with exact reasons and no duplicate effect.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow counters and worker canary before promotion.
rows.rollback_behavior: invalid route/import or exhausted budget is visible terminal/escalated state. Remove ambient unbounded fallbacks after zero use.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove ambient unbounded fallbacks after zero use.

rows.title: oversized rework exceeded the five-task ceiling
rows.root_cause: review rework bypassed finalized dispatch-wave limits.
rows.owner_control: planner/compiler compiles rework waves; executor enforces the same maximum scope/grant as normal dispatch.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. Six-task fixture splits into bounded waves with exact grants and identical accepted output.
rows.rollback_behavior: oversized grant is rejected before worker launch. Delete review-only fanout bypass after zero-call scan.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete review-only fanout bypass after zero-call scan.

rows.title: repeated normalized budget failures did not stop retries
rows.root_cause: circuit identity included task-specific text and every retry was treated as novel.
rows.owner_control: executor normalizes failure class while retaining exact task/ attempt identity; two equivalent `worker_budget_exhausted` occurrences open a plan circuit requiring split/budget authority.
rows.acceptance_proof: M8A. T7 plus T12 opens the circuit before a third blind retry; unrelated failures do not collide.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow-only circuits on captured corpus, then executor canary.
rows.rollback_behavior: open circuit blocks dispatch and preserves checkpoints. Delete unconditional retry branch after false-positive review.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete unconditional retry branch after false-positive review.

rows.title: productive and replayed time/tokens/cost were not authoritative
rows.root_cause: telemetry lacked joined task/batch/attempt/repair identities and stage decomposition.
rows.owner_control: observability emits queue, session-start, inference, tool, validation, retry-wait, compaction, Git, transition, repair, verify, and replay time plus calls/tokens/dollars and accepted-output deltas; Maintenance analyzes but does not mutate.
rows.acceptance_proof: M6 freezes unknown baselines/schema; M8A emits executor fields; M9 joins projections. Replays reconcile totals and never label legitimate M4 implementation/review as waste; missing cost has an explicit reason.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow telemetry across captured and canary runs before an SLO becomes enforcing.
rows.rollback_behavior: missing denominators yield unknown, not zero. Remove raw-total efficiency reports after joined-ledger coverage reaches the M11 gate.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove raw-total efficiency reports after joined-ledger coverage reaches the M11 gate.

rows.title: custody records and overlaps were left open or contradictory
rows.root_cause: request, claim, attempt, decision, index, worker, and repair terminalization were separate best-effort paths.
rows.owner_control: repair custody owns one fenced terminalization transaction or reconciled outbox; Run Authority prevents simultaneous current worker and repair grants for the same subject attempt.
rows.acceptance_proof: M7 writer/identity contract and M10 fault matrix. Every success, failure, cancellation, supersession, timeout, and escalation closes exactly one custody chain; overlap fixture accepts only one actor.
rows.rollout_gate: shadow closure audit, repair/worker canary, genuine block test.
rows.rollback_behavior: ambiguity remains open/pending and blocks another effect. Delete repair sidecar authority after zero reader/writer proof.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete repair sidecar authority after zero reader/writer proof.

rows.title: auditor reasons were heuristic and could join unrelated sessions
rows.root_cause: findings used labels/basenames and omitted deterministic exact IDs.
rows.owner_control: observability gathers exact evidence; Maintenance owns read-only deterministic reasons for normalized consecutive blocks, signature drift, unclosed custody, index mismatch, detection SLO, worker/repair overlap, cross-session joins, projection amplification, full seriality, oversized rework, invalid model, and missing ledger coverage.
rows.acceptance_proof: M9 reason fixtures fire once with exact evidence IDs and never match a same-basename unrelated session; M10/M11 verify recovery reporting.
rows.rollout_gate: report-only shadow and precision review before ticket proposals.
rows.rollback_behavior: unknown evidence produces an explicit unknown reason and no repair. Remove old heuristic gather branches after reason parity.
rows.deletion_gate: Remove old heuristic gather branches after reason parity.

rows.title: mixed source/install/runtime versions could invalidate every proof
rows.root_cause: source, editable install, wrapper, worker, and running process provenance were not one enforced version vector.
rows.owner_control: WBC records code/config/adapter identity; launcher proves it; Run Authority rejects wrong-version claims; observability reports provenance.
rows.acceptance_proof: M6 freezes the vector, M8 adopts it, M11 proves old-reader/ new-writer and new-reader/old-run behavior plus source/install/cloud/resident SHA equality in canary/live evidence.
rows.rollout_gate: no deployment without pinned source and installed/runtime/wrapper receipts.
rows.rollback_behavior: mismatch stops launch/promotion and preserves read-only historical adapters. Delete compatibility writers only after mixed-version replay and forced rollback pass.
rows.deletion_gate: Delete compatibility writers only after mixed-version replay and forced rollback pass.

row_hash_coverage: each row hash computed from deterministically ordered JSON excluding row_hash field
